inputs.text:
This video is a static text-and-image template. The background uses a soft blue-purple gradient, creating a calm, profound, and philosophical atmosphere. At the top of the frame, the title "How to Become a Millionaire" is presented in eye-catching white font, with a simple horizontal line below serving as a visual divider.

The central area features a semi-transparent light-colored dialog box containing the quote: "The little bits of accumulation and choices you make every day are what truly shape your future." The text is concise and powerful, emphasizing the importance of long-termism and small decisions; double quotation marks on both sides enhance the authority of the statement.

Two groups of information are distributed at the bottom left and right: the left side is labeled "@Pixelle.AI" with the subtitle "Open Source Omnimodal AI Creative Agent", indicating the content was generated by an open-source AI creative agent; the right side displays "Pixelle-Video Text Only Template", indicating this is a pure text-style video template. The overall layout is symmetrical and balanced, with a modern and professional design.

A few green leaf patterns adorn the edges of the frame, forming naturally breathing decorative elements against the blue background, adding a touch of vitality and humanistic flavor. The entire interface has no dynamic effects or human figures; it conveys the core idea of wealth growth purely through color, composition, and copywriting—true success comes from the daily accumulation of life's details and wise choices. It is suitable for personal development short videos, financial science popularization, or inspirational sharing scenarios, combining aesthetic quality with practical value.
